title: Quick HTTP Summary
description: Build a workflow that accepts text via HTTP POST, normalizes the payload, summarizes it with an OpenAI chat completion, and returns JSON to the caller via Respond to Webhook.

exam_blueprint.title: Design workflow skeleton
exam_blueprint.instructions: Place Webhook, Set, OpenAI chat, and Respond to Webhook.

exam_blueprint.title: Connect execution flow
exam_blueprint.instructions: Chain nodes in order from trigger to response.

exam_blueprint.title: Finalize configuration
exam_blueprint.instructions: Configure HTTP method, field mapping, summarization prompt, and JSON response.
